item.title: New Amazon Attack Warnings — What 300 Million Customers Need To Know
item.description: As new warnings of attacks against Amazon users are posted to Facebook and X, here’s what you need to know and do.

item.title: iPhone 17e And New MacBook Release Date Twist: Apple May Announce Products Early
item.description: Apple has confirmed a “Special Experience” for March 4, but a new report says that’s not when the products will be revealed.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Thursday, February 19
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: ByteDance Says It Will Add Guardrails After Studios Complain About IP Violations
item.description: Last week, ByteDance introduced its Seedance 2.0 model. Hollywood and major studios quickly complained over AI’s use of celebrity likenesses.

item.title: Netflix’s Best, Overlooked New Show Has A 91% Rotten Tomatoes Score
item.description: A new show has hit Netflix that is being overlooked by almost everyone, but it's got a high Rotten Tomatoes score and a great pedigree.
